characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, light brown complexion, short curly dark hair. Wears glasses in later scenes.
characters.wardrobe: Olive green t-shirt, light blue jeans.

characters.appearance: 2D animated older male, dark skin, thick black mustache, dark hair.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: सच बताऊँ? [Truth be told?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a dramatic, relatable opening.
- Sets a casual, conversational tone.
- Transitions smoothly into the core problem/solution.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Supernova पे अब English बोलना सीखो। [Learn to speak English on Supernova now.] छोटे, daily lessons और real-life situations के साथ। [With short, daily lessons and real-life situations.] Beginners के लिए, और उनके लिए भी जो थोड़ा अटक जाते हैं। [For beginners, and even for those who get a little stuck.] हमारा AI tutor सबकी मदद करता है। [Our AI tutor helps everyone.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the solution for spoken English.
- Highlights key features: daily lessons, real-life situations, and AI tutor.
- Reassures learners of all levels that the app is built for them.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova पे English बोलना सीखो।
Daily lessons और real-life situations.
Beginners और सबके लिए।
AI tutor सबकी मदद करता है।

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Grammar थोड़ी weak थी, पर confidence बढ़िया था! [Grammar was a bit weak, but the confidence was great!]
Character A says: ये मुझे गलती बताता है, पर दोस्त की तरह। और हाँ, practice बिल्कुल real लगती है। [It tells me my mistakes, but like a friend. And yes, the practice feels completely real.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the AI tutor's encouraging but corrective feedback.
- Emphasizes the friendly, non-judgmental learning environment.
- Highlights the realistic feel of the practice sessions.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Grammar थोड़ी weak थी, पर confidence बढ़िया था!
ये मुझे गलती बताता है, पर दोस्त की तरह।
Practice बिल्कुल real लगती है।

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अब आपकी बारी। [Now it's your turn.] Supernova app आज ही try करो, और confidence से English बोलो। [Try the Supernova app today, and speak English with confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong, encouraging Call to Action (CTA).
- Empowers the user to take the first step towards fluency.
- Reinforces the brand name and core benefit (confidence).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अब आपकी बारी।
Supernova app आज ही try करो।
